creator: davidx@viasoft.com.cn
text:
moused is weird on my machine, no matter how I config it,
mouse cursor always jumps crazy, I always lost control.

davidbsd# moused -p /dev/psm0 -3 -i all -f -d

/dev/psm0 ps/2 sysmouse 4D+ Mouse

Fix: 

don't know, it seems the problem is not fixed in 4.x release for a long 
time.
